programme.desc: Donny sues Daphne and Mel makes Niles pretend that they're still married as part of an elaborate revenge.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier uses Martin as bait to ask out the manager of a senior-citizens home.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's new boss (Alan Tudyk) buys a condo in Frasier's building and then copies his interior design.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Dan and Roseanne are in a panic to get their tax returns filed by deadline.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Roseanne becomes involved in a family feud as Fred (Michael O'Keefe) sues Jackie for custody of their unborn child.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Nancy wants to introduce Roseanne and Jackie to her new friend Sharon.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Roseanne tries to limit Fred's participation when Jackie goes into labor.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: When George finally decides to approach his estranged father, Manny Lopez, his solitary journey is transformed into a family vacation and a day of reckoning for Benny.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: George unknowingly commits a felony while awaiting President Bush's arrival at the factory, resulting in the Secret Service paying a visit to his home.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: George is arrested for assaulting his father; Manny wants to clear the air so he drops the charges and George invites him over to dinner; on the same night Benny is bringing her younger boyfriend, Randy, over to meet George.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: Angie learns that her parents are getting divorced; George gets nervous about his marriage when her social life improves.

programme.title: Married ... With Children
programme.desc: To receive extra income, the Bundys agree to house a French foreign exchange student (Milla Jovovich).

programme.title: Married ... With Children
programme.desc: To get money for a good luck charm, Peggy sells Al's Playboy magazine collection.

programme.title: Married ... With Children
programme.desc: Steve's in trouble at the bank when he authorizes a loan for Al's latest invention.

programme.title: Married ... With Children
programme.desc: Al is forced to buy a used car when Peggy spends the money he's saved for a new one.

programme.title: Married ... With Children
programme.desc: Steve quits his corporate job to return to his days as a hippie.

programme.title: Married ... With Children
programme.desc: Al attempts to fix his house's leaky roof during a long rainstorm.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Deacon and Kelly ask Doug and Carrie to be the godparents of their new baby; Arthur is put in charge of the pretzel shop.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie invite Ray and Debra Barone to dinner; Doug gets stuck in an opening leading up to the attic.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug feels so guilty about putting down Arthur that he gives him one of his Mets tickets; Doug gets arrested trying to catch a foul ball.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug gets upset with Carrie after his big-screen TV set is stolen because she accidentally left the garage door open.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie feel inadequate when they discover that their best friends have a very active love life.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug invites Spence to move in as part of a plan to keep Carrie's annoying friends from spending a weekend.

programme.title: Self Driver
programme.desc: Facing mounting expenses and the unrelenting pressure of modern living, a down-on-his-luck cab driver is lured by a mysterious new app that promises fast, easy money.

programme.desc: Poplar River First Nation comedian Paul Rabliauskas brings his observational humor to Montreal where he talks about everything from white people and land acknowledgements to being single during the pandemic.

programme.title: Polar Storm
programme.desc: A scientist must save the day when violent storms threaten Earth's magnetic poles.

programme.title: Stop Making Sense

programme.title: All Light, Everywhere

programme.title: Love in Bloom
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a Chicago florist and a best man as they try to save a stranded couple's wedding in Australia.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj Coster-Waldau begins season two, and we're reminded of the delicate balance between human progress and protecting our planet.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj travels the world to meet people transforming waste into resources; showing that waste isn't something to hide -- it's something we can rethink as valuable raw material.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: From transforming concrete into a carbon sink to mining nickel from genetically enhanced plants, we meet the bold inventors preserving and adapting to nature's offerings to help humanity thrive.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Meeting humanity's insatiable demand for energy while still curbing greenhouse emissions will require creative solutions both big and small.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Looking closely at water, a basic necessity for every human, animal and blade of grass on the planet, which is also in a global crisis; only 0.5% of water on Earth is usable and available freshwater, and climate change is affecting that supply.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: As the world faces climate challenges, imaginative individuals are leading the way toward solutions.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Reclusive author Loretta Sage writes about exotic places in her popular adventure novels that feature a handsome cover model named Alan. While on tour promoting her new book with Alan, Loretta gets kidnapped by an eccentric billionaire who hopes she can lead him to an ancient city's lost treasure from her latest story. Determined to prove he can be a hero in real life and not just on the pages of

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: Twenty-five years after a streak of brutal murders shocked the quiet town of Woodsboro, Calif., a new killer dons the Ghostface mask and begins targeting a group of teenagers to resurrect secrets from the town's deadly past.

programme.title: Scream VI
programme.desc: Four survivors of the Ghostface murders leave Woodsboro behind for a fresh start in New York City. However, they soon find themselves in a fight for their lives when a new killer embarks on a bloody rampage.

programme.title: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: High school student Sadie Harper and her younger sister, Sawyer, are still reeling from the recent death of their mother. They're not getting much support from their father, Will, a therapist who's dealing with his own intense pain. When a desperate patient unexpectedly shows up at their house seeking help, he leaves behind a terrifying supernatural entity that preys on families and feeds on the s

programme.title: The Players
programme.desc: Summer. 1994. Emily is cast as the youngest member of an avant garde theatre production. She is immediately entranced by the bohemian lives of her fellow actors and feels like she has found a surrogate family, but as the lines between artistic and personal relationships blur, Emily becomes trapped in the complex power dynamics within the group.

programme.title: Obsessed to Death
programme.desc: Cassie becomes obsessed with the woman who stole her man away from her.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar and Emma argue over the room temperature; Karen makes Lacey regret disobeying a local yield sign.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent and Lacey mentor high school students; Emma decides to be nicer to Oscar.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash tries saving a couple whose wedding was waylaid by gunfire; Mags' demanding teen patient needs birth control; June struggles with an old habit; an activist patient puts Theo in his place.

programme.title: Once Were Brothers: Robbie Robertson and The Band
programme.desc: The story of a band that went from backing up Bob Dylan to becoming one of the most influential groups of its era.

programme.title: Rush for Your Life
programme.desc: Journalism student Tasha goes under cover as a sorority pledge to expose the people responsible for the death of a student the prior year. She quickly finds herself completing dangerous hazing rituals to secure a spot in the sorority.

programme.title: For Your Eyes Only
programme.desc: When a British ship is sunk in foreign waters, the world's superpowers begin a feverish race to find its cargo: a nuclear submarine control system. And 007 (Roger Moore) is thrust into one of his most riveting adventures as he rushes to join the search ... and prevent global devastation!

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of talking rats. However, when Maurice and the rodents reach the town of Bad Blintz, their little con soon goes down the drain.

programme.title: Spectre
programme.desc: A cryptic message from the past leads James Bond (Daniel Craig) to Mexico City and Rome, where he meets the beautiful widow (Monica Bellucci) of an infamous criminal. After infiltrating a secret meeting, 007 uncovers the existence of the sinister organization SPECTRE. Needing the help of the daughter of an old nemesis, he embarks on a mission to find her. As Bond ventures toward the heart of SPECT

programme.title: Flamin' Hot
programme.desc: Richard Montanez, the son of a Mexican immigrant, was a janitor at Frito-Lay when he came up with the idea for Flamin' Hot Cheetos. His creation, inspired by the flavors of his community, revitalized Frito-Lay and disrupted the food industry.

programme.title: The Forge
programme.desc: A year out of high school with no plans for his future, a boy is challenged by his single mom and a successful businessman to start charting a better course for his life. Through the prayers of his mother and biblical discipleship from his new mentor, he begins discovering God's purpose for his life is so much more than he could hope for or imagine.

programme.title: Close to You
programme.desc: A trans man revisits his hometown, facing family tensions. He reconnects with an old flame, rediscovering himself. His journey leads to self-acceptance and newfound strength.

programme.title: Letterkenny
programme.desc: The Skids go back to their roots.

programme.title: I Am Johnny Cash
programme.desc: The life, music and artistic expression of Johnny's music, from his first hit in 1957 to 2002's Hurt.

programme.title: Air Bud
programme.desc: Diffident in the wake of his father's death, high schooler Josh (Kevin Zegers) struggles to adapt to his new home in Washington state. After Bud joins the team, Josh's life brightens considerably, until th

programme.title: Air Bud: Golden Receiver
programme.desc: Teenager Josh (Kevin Zegers) just became the legal owner of his basketball-playing dog, Buddy. But now Buddy is playing football, too, thanks to veterinarian Patrick Sullivan (Gregory Harrison), who happens to be the new boyfriend of Josh's mom. programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: Secret Headquarters
programme.desc: Friendship and courage take center stage when Charlie and his friends stumble upon the headquarters of the Guard and realize the world's most powerful superhero is Charlie's dad. When an evil businessman sends in a team to infiltrate the lair and retrieve the Guard's energy source, the youngsters spring into action and turn the tables on the intruders.

programme.title: Borat Subsequent Moviefilm
programme.desc: Released from prison for bringing shame to his country, Kazakh funnyman Borat risks life and limb when he returns to America with his 15-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: Jackass Forever
programme.desc: Celebrate the joy of a perfectly executed shot to the groin as Johnny Knoxville, Steve-O and the rest of the gang return for another round of hilarious, wildly absurd and often dangerous displays of stunts and comedy.

programme.title: Drag Brunch Saved My Life!
programme.desc: When this German pub's drag brunches fall flat, Priyanka is summoned to her hometown to teach The Alpine's staff how to serve.

programme.title: Really Happy Someday
programme.desc: Z, a transmasculine theater performer, bombs a pivotal musical theater audition, unable to control his voice after starting testosterone 12 months earlier. To save his own life and livelihood, Z must rediscover himself and his voice.

programme.title: Lovely
programme.desc: An up-and-coming boxer from the projects begins questioning his dream after unforeseen circumstances alter his life.

programme.title: A Sprinkle of Deceit: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah and Chad flirt with their own paths to solve the same murder while working to clear a colleague who is implicated in the crime. Meanwhile, Delores gets her big break.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Movie
programme.desc: When their biggest rival, Humdinger, starts wreaking havoc as the mayor of Adventure City, Ryder and everyone's favorite heroic pups kick into high gear to face the challenge. Armed with exciting new gadgets and gear, the PAW Patrol joins forces with a savvy dachshund to save the citizens of Adventure City.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Mighty Movie
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol pups magically gain superpowers after a meteor strikes Adventure City. However, things take a turn for the worse when Humdinger and a mad scientist steal their powers and turn themselves into supervillains. As the team springs into action to save the city, Skye soon learns that even the smallest pup can make the biggest difference.

programme.desc: The story of a band that went from backing up Bob Dylan to becoming one of the most influential groups of its era.

programme.title: Rush for Your Life
programme.desc: Journalism student Tasha goes under cover as a sorority pledge to expose the people responsible for the death of a student the prior year. She quickly finds herself completing dangerous hazing rituals to secure a spot in the sorority.

programme.title: For Your Eyes Only
programme.desc: When a British ship is sunk in foreign waters, the world's superpowers begin a feverish race to find its cargo: a nuclear submarine control system. And 007 (Roger Moore) is thrust into one of his most riveting adventures as he rushes to join the search ... and prevent global devastation!

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of talking rats. However, when Maurice and the rodents reach the town of Bad Blintz, their little con soon goes down the drain.

programme.title: Spectre
programme.desc: A cryptic message from the past leads James Bond (Daniel Craig) to Mexico City and Rome, where he meets the beautiful widow (Monica Bellucci) of an infamous criminal. After infiltrating a secret meeting, 007 uncovers the existence of the sinister organization SPECTRE. Needing the help of the daughter of an old nemesis, he embarks on a mission to find her. programme.title: Flamin' Hot
programme.desc: Richard Montanez, the son of a Mexican immigrant, was a janitor at Frito-Lay when he came up with the idea for Flamin' Hot Cheetos. His creation, inspired by the flavors of his community, revitalized Frito-Lay and disrupted the food industry.

programme.title: Chicago Med

The 118 responds to calls dealing with parents and their children, including a disastrous birthday party thrown by a mommy blogger; Athena and Michael talk to May about her past suicide attempt; Chimney and Maddie adjust to life with their newborn.
